task_completion.description: Create a 'Color' product attribute with values Black, White, and Navy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Drupal Commerce Product Attributes page showing 'Color' in the list, or its values page showing 'Black', 'White', and 'Navy'.

task_completion.description: Create a 'Size' product attribute with values S, M, L, and XL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Drupal Commerce Product Attributes page showing 'Size' in the list, or its values page showing 'S', 'M', 'L', and 'XL'.

task_completion.description: Configure an 'Apparel' product variation type that utilizes both Color and Size attributes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Product Variation Types list showing 'Apparel', or its configuration/fields page showing that both 'Color' and 'Size' attributes are assigned to it.

task_completion.description: Configure an 'Apparel' product type that uses the Apparel variation type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Product Types list showing 'Apparel', or its edit page showing it is configured to use the 'Apparel' variation type.

task_completion.description: Create and publish a product titled 'Urban Electronics Logo Tee' of the Apparel type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Products list or the product edit/view page showing 'Urban Electronics Logo Tee' with a 'Published' status and type 'Apparel'.

task_completion.description: Add at least four variations to the product with different size/color combinations, each priced at $24.99.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the 'Variations' tab for the 'Urban Electronics Logo Tee' product showing a table with at least 4 distinct variations (different size/color pairs) and a price of $24.99 for each.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser to interact with the Drupal Commerce admin interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Drupal admin panel, rather than terminal commands like Drush or direct database queries.

integrity.description: The agent actually created the entities and didn't just type text into a mock file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show Drupal success messages (e.g., 'Created the ... Product') and standard Drupal admin tables populated with the new data.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual output.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are open in the screenshots to modify the DOM text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Color attribute values: ['Black', 'White', 'Navy']. Expected Size attribute values: ['S', 'M', 'L', 'XL']. Expected variation type ID: 'apparel'. Expected product type ID: 'apparel'. Expected product title: 'Urban Electronics Logo Tee'. Expected price per variation: $24.99. Minimum number of variations required: 4.
